name: GT-Pprops
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-P-properties (proofs/lem-P-properties/export.md, root node 1). For eta<=eta_0<1/4: P=theta(2Phi-1) satisfies P^2=P, P(1)=1, P real-linear on B(H)_sa, delta:=||P-Phi||<=C eta, ||P||<=1+C eta, and delta-positivity (a>=0 => P(a) >= -delta||a|| 1). In particular delta<=C eta; and ||(P-Phi)(a)||<=delta||a|| for all a in B(H)_sa (definition of operator norm of P-Phi).
